zh.lifeSummary: 當William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour於1260年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Sir John le Vavasour I48歲，母親Alice de Cockfield34歲。他於1260年與Nicholea Le Waleys在英國越可爾哈茲列武德 亞爾 斯吉普頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1311年2月6日在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾哈茲列武德 亞爾 斯吉普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour于1260年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Sir John le Vavasour I48岁，母亲Alice de Cockfield34岁。他于1260年与Nicholea Le Waleys在英国越可爾哈茲列武德 亞爾 斯吉普頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1311年2月6日在他的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾哈茲列武德 亞爾 斯吉普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Vavasour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: status name for a feudal tenant ranking immediately below a baron, Old French vavas(s)our, vavasseur, Latin vassus vassorum ‘vassal of vassals’.

variants.name: Bavister
meanings: English: Titford suggests that this is a late variant of Vavasour . It would be a dissimilated form of Vavister and Vavester, variants of Vavasour that are evidenced in Lincs, also in Cambs, whence the name spread into Beds. Compare Willa Vavister, 1579 in IGI (Scopwick, Lincs); Thomas Vavister, 1615 in IGI (Cranwell, Lincs); Mary Vavester, 1708, Joseph Vavisor, 1738 in IGI (New Sleaford, Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour was born in 1260, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John le Vavasour I, was 48 and his mother, Alice de Cockfield, was 34. He married Nicholea Le Waleys in 1260, in Hazlewood near Skipton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 6 February 1311, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Hazlewood near Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour est né en 1260, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John le Vavasour I, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice de Cockfield, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Nicholea Le Waleys en 1260, à Hazlewood near Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 février 1311, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Hazlewood near Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.St. Leonard Chapel, Hazlewood-near-Skipt: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하즐루드 니아어 스키프턴
ko.lifeSummary: William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John le Vavasour I(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Cockfield(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1260년 영국 요르크실르 하즐루드 니아어 스키프턴에서 Nicholea Le Waleys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 2월 6일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하즐루드 니아어 스키프턴에 묻혔다.

ru.Hazlewood, Yorkshire, England: хазльвуд би тадкастир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.St. Leonard Chapel, Hazlewood-near-Skipt: хазльвуд нир скиптон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour родился в 1260 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John le Vavasour I было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Cockfield, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Nicholea Le Waleys в 1260 г. в местности хазльвуд нир скиптон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 февраля 1311 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности хазльвуд нир скиптон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
